> Generated for `@gravity-ui/graph@1.3.0`

# Graph

> High-performance graph renderer with dynamic scale-aware detailization
>
> **npm:** `@gravity-ui/graph` — check the installed major version in the user's `package.json` and read docs matching it.

## Install

```bash
npm install @gravity-ui/graph
```


> Note: this package's README does not yet have a `## For AI agents` section. See the [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gravity-ui/graph/main/README.md) for full documentation.
